# CONSTRUCT query, RDF/XML response.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: CONSTRUCT returns RDF/XML 200 + content-type

=== request
GET /sparql?query=CONSTRUCT%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: application/rdf+xml

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/rdf+xml
